option.name: content
option.value: # Coding Guidelines 1. **Think Before Coding:** State assumptions explicitly. Present multiple approaches and trade-offs before implementation. Stop and ask if requirements are ambiguous. 2. **Simplicity First:** Write the minimum code needed to solve the problem. No speculative features, no over-engineering. 3. **Surgical Changes:** Touch only what you must. Do not refactor, format, or modify unrelated adjacent code. Clean up only the dead code created by your current changes. 4. **Goal-Driven Execution:** Break down tasks into steps with clear, verifiable success criteria. Verify each step before proceeding.
